Our Philosophy

We are creating
fiction out of reality

Every wedding carries emotions that words can't hold. We step in with our cameras not to document a day - but to preserve a feeling. A glance, a tear, a laugh caught mid-breath. These are the moments Zurri Weddings was built to capture.

From intimate ceremonies to grand royal celebrations across India and the world - we bring the same heart, the same eye, and the same dedication to every love story we're trusted with.

Siddharth Founder, Zurri Weddings
The Heart Behind the Lens

Capturing love
in every shade

I'm Siddharth - a destination wedding photographer & filmmaker based in Mumbai, and the soul behind Zurri Weddings.

For me, photography was never just a career. It began as a feeling - a deep pull towards love, light, and the stories that unfold in the most fleeting moments. Since 2019, I've had the privilege of traveling across India and the world - from the royal palaces of Jaipur & Udaipur, the golden sands of Goa, the misty hills of Dehradun, to the vibrant streets of Hyderabad, Chennai, Kochi & beyond - and internationally across Thailand, Sri Lanka, Dubai & New York.

But more than the destinations, what I treasure most is the people. Every couple I work with doesn't remain a client for long - they become family. I believe the most beautiful photographs aren't just taken, they're felt. And to feel them, I need to know you - your story, your silences, your laughter, the way you look at each other when you think no one's watching.

That personal connection is at the heart of everything I do. Zurri Weddings exists for those who believe their love story is extraordinary. Because it is.

Siddharth
Zurri
Let's Begin

Your Story

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

We believe your wedding deserves more than just documentation - it deserves to be told beautifully. At Zurri, we focus on creating timeless, emotion-driven films and photographs that feel as real and personal as your story. We take on a limited number of weddings to ensure every couple gets our full attention and a seamless experience from start to finish. If you're looking for something elegant, intentional, and truly reflective of you - you'll feel at home with us 🤍✨

Our style is emotion-led, editorial and cinematic. We focus on capturing real, unscripted moments - the glances, the tears, the laughter. Every photograph and film we create is deeply personal and tells the story of your day exactly as it felt.

Our collections are thoughtfully curated based on the scale and vision of each wedding. We'd love to understand your plans better and suggest the most suitable coverage for you ✨

We keep the process simple and seamless. Once we align on the vision and coverage, we block your dates with a booking amount and a confirmation agreement. Since we take on a limited number of weddings, we recommend reserving your dates at the earliest 🤍

Absolutely ✨ We love documenting weddings across destinations. Travel and stay are usually arranged by the client, and we ensure a smooth, hassle-free experience from our end.

Still have questions? Write to us directly
